title: Cyrtandra brevicalyx
taxonomy: Cyrtandra brevicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Cyrtandra, which comprises over 600 species of tropical flowering plants. The family Gesneriaceae is a large group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Cyrtandra brevicalyx is native to Papua New Guinea. The plant is an epiphyte, which means it grows on other plants for support.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties.
